name: the-power-of-moments-why-certain-experiences-have-extraordinary-impact
description: Chip and Dan Heath's guide to creating memorable, defining moments — the EPIC framework of Elevation, Insight, Pride, and Connection for designing extraordinary experiences.
useCase: Design memorable experiences — in work, customer service, events, relationships — using the EPIC framework of Elevation, Insight, Pride, and Connection.
knownRisks: Requires intentional effort — not a passive read
